blockers.description: SQLAlchemy concurrent update race condition: OperationalError 1020 when two workers update same (person_id, pmid) in person_article_score
blockers.workaround: Wrap score upsert in db.no_autoflush or use INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

blockers.description: 04-02-SUMMARY.md was never written after plan execution
blockers.workaround: Write it on resume before any other action

decisions.rationale: Submission-order blocking felt slow to users
Matches PubMed rate limits (10/sec with key, 3 without)
Vestigial after as_completed refactor; rows go queued→complete directly
